mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.image_url AS product_image_url, NULLIF(c.specification_id, 0) AS specification_id, ps.name AS specification_name, NULLIF(c.taste_id, 0) AS taste_id, pt.name AS taste_name, COALESCE(p.price, 0.00) + COALESCE(ps.price_delta, 0.00) AS unit_price, c.quantity, (COALESCE(p.price, 0.00) + COALESCE(ps.price_delta, 0.00)) * c.quantity AS amount, CASE WHEN p.id IS NOT NULL AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND p.stock >= c.quantity AND cat.id IS NOT NULL AND cat.deleted = 0 AND cat.status = 1 AND (c.specification_id = 0 OR (ps.id IS NOT NULL AND ps.deleted = 0 AND ps.status = 1)) AND (c.taste_id = 0 OR (pt.id IS NOT NULL AND pt.deleted = 0 AND pt.status = 1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS available FROM shopping_cart c LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = c.product_id AND p.shop_id = c.shop_id LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = p.category_id AND cat.shop_id = p.shop_id LEFT JOIN product_specification ps ON ps.id = c.specification_id AND ps.product_id = c.product_id LEFT JOIN product_taste pt ON pt.id = c.taste_id AND pt.product_id = c.product_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
